purpose: Locate an official code, data, result, or project release linked to the paper.

queries: "Iterate Until Retrieved" "Factual Nugget Optimization" GitHub OR code OR dataset
site:github.com getmosaic-ai INO factual nugget optimization
searches.result: Only arXiv, bibliographic, generic dataset, and unofficial collector/summary pages were found; no official empirical release was identified. The Mosaic-site query returned no results.

reproducibility_ceiling: The complete immutable paper and LaTeX source are preserved, but no official code, prompts, proprietary data, trial rows, traces, human labels, judge outputs, model/configuration manifests, or aggregation scripts were located. Empirical tables and production claims cannot be independently replayed or recomputed.
